steps.title: Identify what difference needs emphasis
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a difference between the two seaweeds. The notes show one concrete distinction: winged kelp received a moderate umami intensity rating while arame received a high rating.

steps.title: Find the choice that contrasts the two
steps.content: Choice C directly uses the contrast word while to emphasize how the two seaweeds differ in umami intensity. Choices A, B, and D all focus on similarities instead: both are brown seaweed (A), both contain umami like other foods (B), or both are seaweed types that trigger umami (D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
